# Allowed permissions for MG4Control.
# Any uses-permission in a manifest NOT listed here FAILS the CI.
# Why: the app runs on a moving vehicle — any new permission
# (especially network or vehicle-write) must be reviewed and added here explicitly.
# One line = one full permission name. '#' = comment.

android.permission.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW
android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE
android.permission.WAKE_LOCK
android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED
android.permission.WRITE_SETTINGS
android.permission.BLUETOOTH
android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT
android.car.permission.CAR_ENERGY
android.car.permission.CAR_POWERTRAIN
android.car.permission.CAR_VENDOR_EXTENSION
android.car.permission.CONTROL_CAR_CLIMATE
# --- network / auto-update (online variant only) ---
android.permission.INTERNET
android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE
android.permission.INSTALL_PACKAGES
